queries.question: Show me the construction companies and the corresponding building roles.
queries.sql: select construction_companies.company_name , building_roles.role_value from Construction_Companies_Building_Roles join Building_Roles on Construction_Companies_Building_Roles.building_role_id = Building_Roles.role_id join Construction_Companies on Construction_Companies_Building_Roles.construction_company_id = Construction_Companies.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?company_name ?role_value WHERE {
  ?construction_companies_building_roles a :Construction_Companies_Building_Roles .
  ?building_roles a :Building_Roles .
  ?construction_companies_building_roles p:hasBuilding_Roles ?building_roles .
  ?construction_companies a :Construction_Companies .
  ?construction_companies_building_roles p:hasConstruction_Companies ?construction_companies .
  ?construction_companies p:company_name ?company_name .
  ?building_roles p:role_value ?role_value .
}

queries.question: What building roles do all construction companies have in common?
queries.sql: SELECT Building_Roles.role_value  from Construction_Companies_Building_Roles join Building_Roles on Construction_Companies_Building_Roles.building_role_id = Building_Roles.role_id join Construction_Companies on Construction_Companies_Building_Roles.construction_company_id = Construction_Companies.id   GROUP BY Construction_Companies_Building_Roles.building_role_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Construction_Companies_Building_Roles.construction_company_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Construction_Companies)

ambiguous_dsl.question: What are the building roles for every construction company?
